description: Maps vibe ids + natural-language triggers to official docs and gallery pages so AI/tools can open the right reference before coding. v1.2: expanded feelingKeywords, triggerPhrases, and keyword→site clusters.
routingInstructions: 1) Match user text to the best vibe `id` via `triggerPhrases` + `feelingKeywords`. 2) Open every URL in `externalRefs` for that vibe (Motion first). 3) Reimplement; do not paste vendor source without license. 4) Cross-link `patterns.json` via `patternsJson`. 5) Use `feelingKeywordToSites` when language is broad (speed, easing, scroll, 3d) before picking a specific vibe.

triggerPhrases: feels like magic ui border beam
i want it to feel like there's energy running around the edge
border that animates around the card
like a laser tracing the box
kitt scanner vibe on the border
not static border something alive on the edge
ring of light around the component
border shimmer but on the edge path

externalRefs.why: keyframes, repeat, linear transitions on custom props
offset paths / stroke motion if vector-based
search for border / beam / glow card patterns
browse backgrounds & cards for accent motion

triggerPhrases: it should look like light is passing through it
shiny loading bar on the card
like light is skimming the button
make it feel expensive with a moving shine
shine goes left to right on repeat
card looks polished when hovered sheen
it should feel like it's radiating warmth or power
button looks like it has energy
card has a soft light pool
make the element feel sacred or premium with glow
feels like a power up state
i want it to feel alive like it's breathing
gentle in and out motion on loop
subtle scale up and down forever
cta softly pulses attention without shouting
make waiting feel calm not dead

externalRefs.why: spring vs tween for organic loop

triggerPhrases: transitions should feel like water not mechanical
opening the drawer should feel fluid
organic duration between five and eight hundred ms
elements should gently float not sit still
soft idle movement in the background
randomize duration per element for organic feel

externalRefs.why: ambient field motion (if available in nav)
ScrollSmoother / parallax only if Motion insufficient

triggerPhrases: when i click it i want immediate satisfying feedback
keep under two hundred ms total
toggle should feel decisive on tap
i want the click to spread outward like a ripple
when something appears it should feel springy and alive
something with energy not boring fade
spring stiffness four hundred damping seventeen vibe
transitions should feel expensive and refined
small y offset four to eight pixels max
no big bounce keep it silk
it should slide in like it was always there
direction matches spatial logic left panel from left
smooth slide from the right for right aligned panel
glide not snap for this drawer

externalRefs.why: drawer / nav motion (confirm slug in sidebar)

feelingKeywords: two fifty to three fifty ms
triggerPhrases: just a clean quiet appearance no fuss
less is more for this overlay
it should hit the screen with confidence
like an explosion of energy from the center
scale from zero to big fade

feelingKeywords: if you notice it reduce it
triggerPhrases: i barely want to notice it just a hint of life
if user notices it it's too much
secondary text gentle shimmer of life
hint of life in the ui
so soft users feel calm not distracted
it should appear and disappear like it was never there
no spatial movement just blur fade
respect reduced motion maybe skip blur
subtle blur fade for toast optional
when it snaps into place i want it to feel confirmed
form validation snap to error field

triggerPhrases: a quick visual nod that the action worked
eighty ms success color scale one oh five
three hundred ms total ease out

feelingKeywordToSites.note: Pair Theatre.js or R3F with Motion for DOM overlay UI.
Speed words map to duration bands; combine with a vibe id for full intent.
Easing words map to bezier/spring choices; see tone-to-motion.md TRANSLATION_RULES.
Intensity phrases map to scale/opacity ranges; respect prefers-reduced-motion.
Direction phrases map to translate/scale sign; match layout logic.
